The trace demonstrates several issues, including agents ignoring each other's input, repeating the same information, disobeying task specifications (like providing incomplete code), and prematurely terminating tasks. There's also evidence of action-reasoning mismatches and a lack of robust verification. The system frequently derails from the intended objective, and in some cases, agents exhibit a loss of conversation history.
